title: Diced Irish Kale Kale Salad
description: A peppery and invigorating post-workout salad that showcases the best of Irish kale, enhanced with saffron and namul-blanch-season.

ingredients.name: 2 cloves garlic
ingredients.notes: optional, omit for a milder flavor

ingredients.name: 1/2 teaspoon salt
ingredients.notes: use flaky sea salt for added texture

ingredients.name: 1/4 teaspoon black pepper
ingredients.notes: freshly ground for the best flavor

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup crumbled goat cheese
ingredients.notes: optional, omit for a vegan version

ingredients.name: 1/2 teaspoon saffron threads
ingredients.notes: soaked in 1 tablespoon hot water for 10 minutes

instructions: Blanch the kale in boiling water for 30 seconds to remove bitterness, then immediately submerge in an ice bath to stop cooking.
Pat dry the kale with a clean kitchen towel to remove excess moisture.
In a blender or food processor, combine the olive oil, namul-blanch-season, salt, and black pepper, and blend until smooth.
In a large bowl, combine the blanched kale, sliced onion, minced garlic, and crumbled goat cheese (if using).
Pour the blended dressing over the kale mixture and toss to coat.
Stir in the soaked saffron threads and their liquid, and adjust seasoning as needed.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, garnish with chopped parsley and mint.
Drizzle with apple cider vinegar just before serving.
